bug: Inappropriate disclosure of system test status
details: The agent explicitly tells the patient the data mismatch is being ignored 'for demo purposes'. This breaks the illusion of a professional medical environment and reveals sensitive system testing logic to the user.
quote: the birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, i'll accept it.

details: The patient stated their intent (follow-up for knee surgery) in the first turn. After verifying the DOB, the agent asks 'how can i help you today?' as if the patient hadn't already provided the exact reason for the call.
quote: how can i help you today?

details: The agent experiences a persistent 'system error' regarding the visit reason. The AI fails to self-correct, resulting in an inability to complete the primary task (booking the appointment).
quote: i'm having trouble booking the appointment due to a system error with the visit reason.

details: The agent promises to connect the patient to a live representative to resolve the booking error. Instead of completing the transfer, the system routes the patient to a dead-end test line message that immediately hangs up on the user.
quote: connecting you to a representative, please wait. hello, you've reached the pretty good ai test line. goodbye.
